title: Most EPIC scene in the entire franchise
display_title: Most EPIC scene in the entire franchise
wikitext:
[]: [Spoilers] Most EPIC scene in the entire franchise?             Quote Post by ILUVASUKALANGLEY » Sun May 30, 2010 5:33 pm I think the best scene evar!! Is Asuka beating up Shinji naked in 2.22. I've not laughed that hard in a good while. What do you think it the most epic scene in EVA? EDIT: ~~~~~~~~~~~ I hadn't meant this as a Rebuild topic only that with everything in the franchise games, manga, TV series and anything else. What seems like the most epic scene? Even though Rebuild 3 and 4 aren't out...

[]:             Quote Post by simon » Sun May 30, 2010 5:49 pm you're 27?

[]:             Quote Post by Wissenschaft » Sun May 30, 2010 5:58 pm This: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=jk8c9GD9zMo&feature=related And its fan made.

[]:             Quote Post by ran1 » Sun May 30, 2010 7:20 pm My personal favorite. Hell, I wrote a massive essay on it. lolmontagetheory ftw

[]:             Quote Post by LeoXiao » Sun May 30, 2010 7:40 pm Asuka beats up Shinji while she's naked or the other way around? Either way, I have to see 2.22 at some point; is it out in english yet?

[]:             Quote Post by ILUVASUKALANGLEY » Sun May 30, 2010 8:40 pm simon wrote: you're 27?

[]: Re: Spoilers: Most EPIC scene in the entire franchise?             Quote Post by Legendary » Sun May 30, 2010 8:45 pm ILUVASUKA wrote: What do you think it the most epic scene in EVA?

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Sun May 30, 2010 8:54 pm Aside from the entirety of The End of Evangelion, mine has to be Episode 16. It was the battle with Leliel that I caught on TV one night that made me perk up and say "Hey, this Eva I keep hearing about is freaking amazing!" But in the Rebuild universe I'd say the Sahaquiel incident gets me pumped. A LOT.

[]: Re: Spoilers: Most EPIC scene in the entire franchise?             Quote Post by ILUVASUKALANGLEY » Sun May 30, 2010 8:56 pm Legendary wrote: Shinji's yelling at Gendo in 19. Rebuild-related topics go here regardless of anything else involved, especially with spoilers.

[]:             Quote Post by planet news » Sun May 30, 2010 11:25 pm Epic to me means Lord of the Rings . I think its pretty obvious that insane battle the end of 2.22 is the most epic scene out of any part of the franchise. It had everything that makes Eva epic; i.e. Shinji screaming, naked Rei, berserk Evas, angel wings, Ritsuko sounding prophetic. It out Lorded the Rings in my opinion. My jaw was dropped.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Mon May 31, 2010 1:18 am I was under the impression that this would be suited more for: Evangelion Chit-Chat This is a forum for casual discussion of Evangelion. Topics like "Asuka is hot!" or "Which Eva kicks the most ass?" belong here.

[]:             Quote Post by Nonoriri » Mon May 31, 2010 1:55 am The best scene in the entire franchise is Asuka vs the MP Evas, nothing even comes close.

[]:             Quote Post by bladerj » Mon May 31, 2010 2:25 am Misato ass shot, and Asuka crotch shot.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon May 31, 2010 6:20 am In terms of truly EPIC, you really can't beat EoE's KST and subsequent termination of 3I... Special effects couldn't do as much back then, but those scenes literally were global and pan-humanity in scope -- and involved a being so colossally gigantic she couldn't fit inside the atmosphere.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Mon May 31, 2010 6:55 am The battle with Rebuild Zuruel and 2.XX's ending.

[]:             Quote Post by Longinus92 » Mon May 31, 2010 8:17 am Beach scene at the end of EoE.

[]:             Quote Post by Podferio » Mon May 31, 2010 8:45 am Since the story isn't exactly the same, i'd say the giant Rei scene in EoE and the last battle in 2.22 where Shinji saves(?) Rei.

[]:             Quote Post by Ramiel² » Mon May 31, 2010 8:55 am 1. EoE Fight of Asuka 2. Rebuild Ramiel 3. Rebuild Zeruel 4. Armisael/Arael/Leliel in NGE classic

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Mon May 31, 2010 9:02 am I don;t think anything will be moar badass-ish-epic, than the EoE Asuka fight. Man, that scene always gives me the chills. But, technically, i gotta wait for 3.0+4.0 to have complete judgmentz. p.s the second comment in this thread wins dumbass medal btw.

[]:             Quote Post by NatTheWriter » Mon May 31, 2010 9:08 am Original Series: Leliel's death. Very awesome. Rebuild: The final battle with Ramiel.

Article: Most EPIC scene in the entire franchise
 the entirety of The End of Evangelion, mine has to be Episode 16. It was the battle with Leliel that I caught on TV one night that made me perk up and say "Hey, this Eva I keep hearing about is freaking amazing!" But in the Rebuild universe I'd say the Sahaquiel incident gets me pumped. A LOT.
